title: Markov Chains
description: Model systems with no memory: from weather prediction to PageRank. Build transition matrices, find stationary distributions, and discover why almost every Markov chain forgets its starting point — with concrete simulations at every step.
persona: For curious learners who finished Pattern Hitting Times and want to see the state-machine machinery in its full generality. Linear algebra intuition helpful but not required.
tagline: Where does a memoryless process settle?
